things.name: Suomenlinna Sea Fortress
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 18th-century island fortress — 15-minute ferry from the Market Square

things.name: Helsinki Cathedral & Senate Square
things.description: Iconic neo-classical white cathedral on the grand Senate Square — the city's most recognisable landmark

things.name: Temppeliaukio Rock Church
things.description: Extraordinary 1969 church excavated directly into granite bedrock with a stunning copper dome

things.name: Design District Helsinki
things.description: 25-block district in the city's heartland packed with Finnish design shops, museums and galleries

things.name: Market Square (Kauppatori) & Old Market Hall
things.description: Waterfront market with Finnish produce, salmon soup and the Old Market Hall — one of Europe's finest

things.name: National Museum of Finland
things.description: Finnish history from the Stone Age to the present in a dramatic 1916 National Romantic building

things.name: Kiasma Museum of Contemporary Art
things.description: Steven Holl's celebrated curving white museum housing Finland's premier contemporary art collection

things.name: Uspenski Cathedral
things.description: Largest Orthodox church in Western Europe (1868) — rust-red brick with gold onion domes on a promontory

things.name: Nuuksio National Park
things.description: Ancient boreal forest and lake wilderness 40 km northwest — hiking, swimming and Finnish saunas

things.name: Stockmann Department Store & Esplanade Park
things.description: Scandinavia's largest department store alongside the elegant esplanade gardens and outdoor cafes
